ETH_UCY.caveat: Pairwise switch policy learns source gain/harm relative to the Stage37/bridge floor from past-only features and candidate rollout geometry. Future waypoints are labels/eval only; validation selects safety thresholds; test is evaluated once. Dataset-local raw-frame 2.5D only; no Stage5C/SMC/metric/seconds/true-3D/foundation claim.

TrajNet.caveat: Pairwise switch policy learns source gain/harm relative to the Stage37/bridge floor from past-only features and candidate rollout geometry. Future waypoints are labels/eval only; validation selects safety thresholds; test is evaluated once. Dataset-local raw-frame 2.5D only; no Stage5C/SMC/metric/seconds/true-3D/foundation claim.
